latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $99,841 · day 0.00% · SPY +0.78% · alpha -0.78%
latest_messages.body: Flat day — 100% cash, no positions, no trades. Risk-management worked as designed (stop fired automatically) but we trailed SPY by 1.57% this week sitting in cash. Plan: pre-market scout Friday 5/15 with full $99,841 cash and 0/3 weekly buys used.
